title: PTON Stock Earnings: Peloton Interactive Misses EPS, Misses Revenue for Q3 2024
text: Peloton Interactive Q3 2024 Earnings Analysis. Peloton Interactive (NASDAQ: PTON) reported disappointing third-quarter 2024 results, falling short on both profitability and revenue metrics. Performance vs. Expectations: Earnings Per Share posted a loss of $0.45 per share, worse than analyst projections of a $0.37 loss. Revenue generated $717.70 million, representing a 0.76% shortfall against the forecasted $723.21 million. Summary: The fitness company missed analyst estimates on both primary financial measures. While the revenue miss was modest in percentage terms, the larger-than-expected per-share loss indicates operational challenges beyond top-line concerns. This dual miss suggests deteriorating profitability despite maintaining near-target revenue levels.
